## Checklist

- [ ] Linked the related issue (`Closes #...`)
- [ ] `bun run check` passes (0 errors, 0 warnings)
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run test` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Followed component conventions (Svelte 5 runes, typed public API, no `any`)
